scripts.bundle:android: NODE_ENV=production npx expo export --platform android --output-dir android/app/src/main/assets
scripts.build:apk: npm run bundle:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk-release: npm run bundle:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:apk:unix: npm run bundle:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk-release:unix: npm run bundle:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
